From pretty decor and great multi-cuisine food, these haunts have been impressing us for good reason. End your search of where to go next and head to these new restaurants in Hyderabad.

parent.search_query: Hyderabad cafes where startup people hang out
parent.snippet: This new cafe in Himayatnagar is being frequented by youngsters and families for its earthy decor, great coffees and food. We like that people coming in from far away parts of Hyderabad, like Dilsukhnagar and beyond, have a spot to hang out without travelling too much. Timing: 11 AM - 11 PM Rating: 4.5/5 Price For Two: INR 1,200 (approx.)
parent.title: 27 New Cafes In Hyderabad That You Must Visit For A Group Hang - LBB
